ksa_text: Skill in writing and refactoring ML code to production quality, including data processing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation pipelines, documentation, unit testing, and the transformation of research-quality prototypes into deployable systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("pipelines?", "unit test", "feature engineer"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4118); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in DE job postings or cert curricula (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Would a working Data Engineer self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the technical practice is implicit in DE work (domain affinity 0.38, 3 DE signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate DE competencies.
